current_suggestion.pitch: Andy Galpin is a muscle physiology and performance scientist whose work sits precisely between Renaissance Periodization's hypertrophy programming and Peter Attia's longevity framing — but his angle is elite athletic performance and the underlying cellular mechanisms that neither fully covers. He goes deep on VO2 max, muscle fiber adaptation, sleep's role in recovery, and HRV in ways that are mechanistic without being purely clinical. Format is a mix of solo deep-dives and interviews, all long-form with genuine data literacy.

history: TEDx Talks – Russ Roberts (EconTalk host solo appearances)
EP Wealth Advisors (with Ben Felix-style rigor — try 'The Plain Bagel' instead)
